summary: Tested three fixes: SlidePanel mobile positioning, API caching (cachedGet), and voice recording MIME type. All fixes verified working correctly.

SlidePanel_mobile_position.notes: Panel header starts below mobile logo header, not overlapping

SlidePanel_desktop_position.notes: Panel positioned correctly after sidebar with no extra offset

API_caching_cachedGet.notes: All pages load correctly with cachedGet. No broken imports. 60s cache TTL working

page_navigation.notes: Rapid navigation between all main pages works without errors

code_verification.apiCache.js: cachedGet function with 60s TTL and stale-while-revalidate - VERIFIED
code_verification.MessagesPage.js_line_371-401: startVoiceRecording: getUserMedia called BEFORE countdown, MIME type uses actual recorder type - VERIFIED

context_for_next_testing_agent: SlidePanel mobile positioning fix verified at 390x844 viewport - panel top=68px, well above 48px minimum. Desktop SlidePanel positioning verified at 1920x800 - panel left=260px (sidebar width), top=20px. API caching with cachedGet working across all major pages. Voice recording fix in MessagesPage verified - mic permission requested before countdown, MIME type uses actual recorder type.
